name: Parametric Pavilion Generator
description: Generates a parametric pavilion structure driven by a grid of user-defined control points. Outputs structural member layout, roof surface geometry, and a basic material schedule directly into Revit.
author: your name
notes: Control point heights drive a interpolated surface using numpy. Works best with even grid dimensions. Odd grid counts may produce asymmetric results at boundary edges. Column family must be loaded in the Revit model before running.
